# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive Logging Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  comprehensive-logging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Log environment variables
        run: echo "## Environment Variables ##"
        env:
          variable1: ${{ secrets.VARIABLE1 }}
          variable2: ${{ secrets.VARIABLE2 }}
        run: |
          echo "${variable1}"
          echo "${variable2}"

      - name: Log command outputs
        run: echo "## Command Outputs ##"
        run: |
          result=$(python script.py)
          echo "$result"

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}
          CONNECTION_STRING: ${{ secrets.CONNECTION_STRING }}
        run: |
          python deploy.py

      - name: Log deployment details
        run: echo "## Deployment Details ##"
        run: |
          echo "${API_KEY}"
          echo "${CONNECTION_STRING}"

      - name: Log API responses
        run: echo "## API Responses ##"
        env:
          API_RESPONSE: ${{ steps.deploy-to-production.outputs.api_response }}
        run: |
          echo "${API_RESPONSE}"

      - name: Fail job on error
        if: failure()
        run: exit 1
